epigraph: “The early morning has gold in its mouth.” — Franklin

agenda.event: Max — Thom drop off & pick up
Esme — Sanjeev drop off, walk/bus to Southwood

messages.preview: When you have a moment please send details of SEIS not password protected so I can send to our new accountants .
Hi mate - alll set WC!? Most likely the same old story of over promise.. under deliver. Oh well it’s an excuse to watch football for a month
You're welcome really glad they enjoyed! festival has been great this year. Honestly it was less than a tenner so don't worry at all X
it does! Gemini didn't say to try that. Roscoe is better than Gemini clearly x

tasks.text: Brian. Book meeting Prep for Caroline
Get testimonial quote from CEO of Parkinson's UK (on-on-one in two weeks).

weather.narrative: Drizzle through the morning, easing by afternoon. Take a coat for the school run.

lead.headline: Your accountants need SEIS documents unprotected today.
lead.deck: A WhatsApp message flags that your new accountants are waiting for SEIS details in an unencrypted format to move forward with your accounts. This is blocking their work and needs immediate attention.
